questions.question: Explain the concept of decentralization using blockchain technology. Provide one key method used to achieve decentralization in blockchain networks.
questions.hint: Decentralization in blockchain technology refers to the absence of a central authority controlling the network.

questions.question: What is the full ecosystem of blockchain technology? Describe the key components involved in this ecosystem.
questions.hint: The full ecosystem of blockchain technology includes nodes, wallets, smart contracts, and applications.

questions.question: State the advantages of using blockchain technology for decentralized networks. Use at least two key benefits.
questions.hint: Blockchain technology provides security and transparency in decentralized networks.
